narrative: OMX30 opens to strong European tailwinds with DAX and CAC rallying +1.26% and +1.35% respectively, supported by weighted correlation signal of +0.929%. The index sits 10.7% above its 200-MA in a defined bull market regime with ADX 35.6 confirming strong directional bias. However, technicals flash overbought warnings: RSI 68.6, Stochastic K at extremes (100.0), and price 1.12% above upper Bollinger Band signal imminent mean reversion risk. USD/SEK weakness (-0.76%) and EUR/SEK decline (-0.55%) create headwinds for Sweden's export champions despite positive risk sentiment. Copper strength (+0.58%) supports industrials and Boliden, offsetting modest oil weakness (-3.22%). The setup favors a cautious long bias with tight risk management given extended technical positioning.
morningBrief: OMX30 enters Monday with tailwind from strong DAX/CAC performance and Asia recovery (Nikkei +2.87%), but technicals demand respect: RSI 68.6 and Stochastic K at 100 indicate overbought conditions within our bull market structure. Expect consolidation or modest pullback to 50-MA (~3150) before higher breakout; support holds at 3085 (lower Bollinger). Sector divergences: Industrials (Atlas Copco, Volvo) face USD/SEK headwind despite positive risk tone; Banks (SEB, Handelsbanken) neutral as yields sink 61bp (NIM compression risk); Boliden a tactical long on copper tailwind. Key watch: US Jobless Claims at 14:30 CET and Iran geopolitical risk for commodity moves. Position longs cautiously; mean reversion into afternoon is elevated risk given extremes. Avoid chasing into overbought territory; wait for pullback entries with tight stops.
drivers: Strong European equity momentum (DAX +1.26%, CAC +1.35%) with weighted correlation +0.929%
OMX30 in established bull market, +10.7% above 200-MA with strong ADX 35.6 (bullish bias)
Copper +0.58% supports industrials; however RSI 68.6 and Stochastic K=100 flag mean reversion risk
USD/SEK weakness (-0.76%) headwind for exporters despite positive risk sentiment
Overbought technicals (Bollinger %B=1.12, K=100) require caution despite bullish macro setup

sectorImpacts.reason: Copper +0.58% supports demand narrative, but USD/SEK weakness (-0.76%) pressures export margins. Geopolitical risk (Iran/fertiliser) adds uncertainty for Volvo/Sandvik.
US 10Y yield down 61bp to 4.558% compresses NIM expectations. Further rate decline headwind for Swedish bank profitability.
Copper +0.58% and gold +0.05% drive direct revenue lift. Boliden primary beneficiary of commodity strength amid geopolitical risk.
NASDAQ +0.19% provides modest support; risk-on sentiment favours growth. However, USD/SEK weakness tempers foreign revenue translation.
Yields down 61bp reduces refinancing cost pressure short-term, but extended bull market and equity strength may dampen real estate rotation.

watchList.reason: Copper +0.58% and gold +0.05% provide direct revenue drivers. Strong commodity backdrop supports mining exposure.
USD/SEK headwind (-0.76%) pressures export margin despite industrial cyclical support. Iran risk adds near-term uncertainty.
Overbought technicals and weak USD/SEK create entry risk. Wait for pullback to 50-MA before adding longs.
Yield decline (-61bp) compresses NIM expansion narrative. Banks underperform in declining rate environment.
NASDAQ support (+0.19%) and risk-on sentiment favour telecom growth. Watch for pullback entries given overbought OMX30.

econCalendarAlert: No Swedish releases scheduled. US Jobless Claims at 14:30 CET (consensus 218K) — key volatility trigger. Monitor Iran trade tensions via commodity reaction (oil, copper). ECB speakers may inject rate guidance noise.
topRisk: Overbought technicals (RSI 68.6, Stochastic K=100, Bollinger %B=1.12) create elevated mean reversion risk into afternoon. Sharp pullback to 3120–3085 possible without negative catalyst. Secondary risk: Iran escalation or Trump trade policy reversal could spike VIX 16.7 and trigger risk-off in extended OMX30.
technicalSummary: Bull market regime confirmed: +10.7% above 200-MA, +4.7% above 50-MA
MACD above signal with histogram +9.268 (bullish momentum intact)
ADX 35.6 with bullish DI bias (strong trending environment)
RSI 68.6 and Stochastic K=100/D=82.3 (OVERBOUGHT — mean reversion flagged)
Price 1.12% above upper Bollinger Band, width 5.57% (narrowing volatility)
ROC-90 +6.9% confirms strong underlying momentum despite technicals
52-week positioning: 96% of range, -1.0% from all-time high (limited upside room)
